author: y4rr
content:
Probe design: Three production patterns to verify equivalence:
(1) ViT PatchEmbed: [B,C,P] -> [B,P,C] via permute(0,2,1).contiguous()
(2) ConvNeXt nhwc_from_nchw: [B,C,H,W] -> [B,H,W,C] via permute(0,2,3,1).contiguous()
(3) ConvNeXt nchw_from_nhwc: [B,H,W,C] -> [B,C,H,W] via permute(0,3,1,2).contiguous()
(4) Swin BCHW->BHWC flat (used as [B,H*W,C]): permute(0,2,3,1).contiguous().view([B,H*W,C])
(5) Swin BHWC->BCHW flat (used as [B,C,H,W]): view([B,H,W,C]).permute(0,3,1,2).contiguous()
Each compared per-element to the existing manual data_vec indexed loop on a deterministic seeded tensor before model code is touched.
